stocks.impact_theory: Telesat reported narrower Q4 losses and CEO expressed bullish outlook on satellite demand amid AI and global connectivity needs. Economic implications include growth in LEO/GEO services. Market psychology: positive earnings surprise boosts confidence. Historical parallels: similar to satellite firms during 2021 space race hype. Analogies: like a rocket launch gaining momentum; or a satellite locking onto a strong signal.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Strong earnings beat and CEO optimism amid hot PPI/Fed but sector resilient. X sentiment positive on satellite tech. Web news confirms 19% surge.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10-20% gains on continued momentum, target $50.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, high volume supports upside.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Market selloff from Fed hawkishness, competition from Starlink.

stocks.justification: Direct company news driving move, high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: $2.4B AI data-center power contract expands backlog, raised 2026 EBITDA to $80-100M. Ties to energy demand from AI/oil surge. Psychology: AI-energy nexus excites investors. Parallels: GE power deals in 2010s. Analogies: fueling the AI engine; powering up like a nuclear reactor.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Contract news amid oil volatility boosts energy infra play. Positive analyst upgrades.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if execution risks emerge, potential 10% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Project delays, high debt, broader industrial slowdown.

stocks.justification: Specific catalyst with backlog growth, aligns with macro energy trends.

stocks.impact_theory: Resumed oil flow from pipeline after federal order, expected 50k bbl/d amid Brent $108 on Iran attack. Implications: supply boost in high price env. Psychology: relief rally. Parallels: US shale restarts. Analogies: oil gusher; pipeline unclogged.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Geopolitical oil spike + operational restart. Monthly top gainer.

stocks.justification: Strong news but small cap volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Brent crude soars to $108 on Iran gas field attack, boosting majors. Implications: higher refining margins. Psychology: flight to energy. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine. Analogies: oil price tsunami; energy shield in geopolitics.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil up 5%+, energy sector outperforms amid PPI fears.

stocks.impact_theory: Hotter PPI raises rate hike fears pre-Fed, hits growth stocks. Implications: higher discount rates hurt valuations. Psychology: risk-off. Parallels: 2022 rate cycle. Analogies: interest rate anchor dragging chip boats; Fed hawk shadow.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Futures down 0.4%, Nasdaq sensitive to yields up. Sentiment shift negative.

stocks.justification: Broad market reaction, high conviction on rates impact.
